# Generated Files

INFYNON may create local configuration and workspace files on your machine.

Common locations:

```txt
~/.infynon/
~/.infynon/ninja.yml
~/.infynon/workspaces/
~/.infynon/tasks/
~/.infynon/soul.md
.infynon/
.infynon/.env
.infynon/trace/
```

On Windows:

```txt
C:\Users\<user>\.infynon\
C:\Users\<user>\.infynon\ninja.yml
C:\Users\<user>\.infynon\workspaces\
C:\Users\<user>\.infynon\tasks\
```

These files are used for workspace configuration, task state, API flow variables, Trace memory, and local CLI behavior.

Do not delete them unless you want to reset INFYNON local state.
